name: merchant_id
description: Merchant ID this cart is associated with

name: currency_code
description: The ISO-4217 three letter currency code the customer is viewing prices in

name: base_currency_code
description: The ISO-4217 three letter base currency code of the account

name: exchange_rate
description: The exchange rate if the customer is viewing a different currency than the base

name: language_iso_code
description: The ISO-631 three letter code the customer would like to checkout with

fields.name: state_region
fields.description: State for United States otherwise region or province for other countries

fields.name: cc_emails
fields.description: CC emails.  Multiple allowed, but total length of all emails can not exceed 100 characters.

fields.name: day_phone_hash
fields.description: Day time phone Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: cell_phone_e164_hash
fields.description: Cell phone (E164 format) Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: delivery_date
fields.description: Date the customer is requesting delivery on. Typically used for perishable product delivery.

fields.name: ship_on_date
fields.description: Date the customer is requesting that the order ship on.  Typically used for perishable product delivery.

fields.name: ship_to_residential
fields.description: True if the shipping adress is residential.  Effects the methods that are available to the customer as well as the price of the shipping method.

fields.name: special_instructions
fields.description: Special instructions from the customer regarding shipping

fields.name: lift_gate
fields.description: Lift gate requested (LTL shipping methods only)

fields.name: day_phone_hash
fields.description: Day time phone Hash SHA-256 Base64

fields.name: comments
fields.description: Comments from the customer.  Rarely used on the single page checkout.

fields.name: ip_address
fields.description: IP Address (read only unless non-browser key authenticated)

fields.name: return_code
fields.description: Return code assigned for send return email operation

fields.name: return_url
fields.description: The URL to redirect the customer to when they return from an abandon cart email.  Must be https protocol.

fields.name: abandon_return_url
fields.description: This is the URL you can use in a custom abandon marketing to return the customer to their cart

fields.name: current_step
fields.description: Current step of the checkout (read only)

fields.name: upsell_path_code
fields.description: Upsell path code (this is for legacy upsells only)

fields.name: finalize_after_dts
fields.description: The date/time after which the cart will finalize into an order.

fields.name: finalize_after_minutes
fields.description: The amount of inactivity in minutes after which the cart should be finalized into an order.  This will calculate the finalize_after_dts field.

fields.name: gift_charge
fields.description: Additional charge for making this order a gift

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: gift_wrap_cost
fields.description: Cost of the gift wrap selected

fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: gift
fields.description: True if this order is a gift

fields.name: gift_wrap_title
fields.description: Title of the selected gift wrap

fields.name: gift_certificate_amount
fields.description: The amount used on the gift certificate

fields.name: currency_code

fields.name: gift_certificate_remaining_balance_after_order

fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.description: True if the customer agrees to receiving marketing SMS messages

fields.name: customer_profile_credit_card_id

fields.name: county
fields.description: Tax county if the state requires it.

fields.name: tax_exempt
fields.description: True if this profile is exempt from sales tax

fields.description: True if this profile is allowed to use a purchase order

fields.name: allow_cod
fields.description: True if this profile is allowed to use a COD

fields.name: free_shipping
fields.description: True if this profile always qualifies for free shipping

fields.description: The minimum amount that this profile has to purchase to qualify for free shipping

fields.description: Minimum subtotal this profile must purchase

fields.description: Minimum item count this profile must purchase

fields.name: maximum_item_count
fields.description: Maximum item count this profile can purchase

fields.name: no_realtime_charge
fields.description: True if this customers orders are not charged in real-time

fields.name: no_free_shipping
fields.description: True if this profile is never given free shipping

fields.description: True if profile is allowed to bill to their 3rd party shipping account

fields.name: no_coupons
fields.description: True if this profile is prevented from using coupons

fields.name: pricing_tiers
fields.description: Pricing tier names this profile qualifies for

fields.name: billing_addresses
fields.description: Billing addresses on file for this profile

fields.description: Tax county if a billing address

fields.description: Card nmumber (masked last 4 digits) Hash SHA-256 Base64

name: settings
description: Settings for options that should be available during the checkout

fields.name: allow_gifts
fields.description: True if this checkout supports gift giving

fields.name: gift_charge
fields.description: The cost associated with sending a gift

fields.name: localized_formatted
fields.description: Value localized and formatted for the customer

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: Currency code of the localized value

fields.name: max_message_length
fields.description: The maximum length of the gift message the giver can enter

fields.name: gift_wraps
fields.description: The gift wraps available for the customer to select from

fields.name: cost
fields.description: Cost if this gift wrap is selected

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL for the sample of the gift wrap

fields.description: Terms of the checkout the customer must agree to

fields.name: supports_check
fields.description: True if check payments are available on this order

fields.name: supports_credit_card
fields.description: True if credit card payments are available on this order

fields.name: supports_paypal
fields.description: True if PayPal payments are available on this order

fields.description: True if purchase order payments are available on this order

fields.description: True if Amazon payments are available on this order

fields.description: True if the credit card verification number should be collected

fields.name: collect_credit_card_verification_number_minimum
fields.description: If this field is null or the total is greater than or equal to this value then collect the CVV2.

fields.name: need_payment
